targets.query:
from(bucket: "events")
  |> range(start: 0)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "events" and r._field == "count" and r.type == "impressions")
  |> sum()

from(bucket: "events")
  |> range(start: 0)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "events" and r._field == "count" and r.type == "clicks")
  |> sum()

from(bucket: "events")
  |> range(start: 0)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "events" and r._field == "count" and r.type == "conversions")
  |> sum()

from(bucket: "events")
  |> range(start: -1h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "events" and r._field == "count" and (r.type == "impressions" or r.type == "clicks"))
  |> group(columns: ["type"])
  |> sum()
  |> group()
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["_measurement"], columnKey: ["type"], valueColumn: "_value")
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({
      _value: if exists r.impressions and r.impressions > 0
        then (float(v: r.clicks) / float(v: r.impressions)) * 100.0
        else 0.0,
      _field: "CTR",
      _time: now()
    }))

from(bucket: "events")
  |> range(start: -1h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "events" and r._field == "count" and (r.type == "conversions" or r.type == "clicks"))
  |> group(columns: ["type"])
  |> sum()
  |> group()
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["_measurement"], columnKey: ["type"], valueColumn: "_value")
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({
      _value: if exists r.clicks and r.clicks > 0
        then (float(v: r.conversions) / float(v: r.clicks)) * 100.0
        else 0.0,
      _field: "Conv Rate",
      _time: now()
    }))

from(bucket: "events")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "events" and r._field == "count" and r.type == "impressions")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1m, fn: sum, createEmpty: true)
  |> fill(value: 0.0)
  |> set(key: "_field", value: "Impressions")

from(bucket: "events")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "events" and r._field == "count" and r.type == "clicks")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1m, fn: sum, createEmpty: true)
  |> fill(value: 0.0)
  |> set(key: "_field", value: "Clicks")

from(bucket: "events")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "events" and r._field == "count" and r.type == "conversions")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1m, fn: sum, createEmpty: true)
  |> fill(value: 0.0)
  |> set(key: "_field", value: "Conversions")

panels.title: Top 10 States by Impressions — last hour

targets.query:
from(bucket: "events")
  |> range(start: -1h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "events" and r._field == "count" and r.type == "impressions")
  |> group(columns: ["state"])
  |> sum()
  |> group()
  |> sort(columns: ["_value"], desc: true)
  |> limit(n: 10)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _field: r.state, _time: now()}))

from(bucket: "events")
  |> range(start: -24h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "events" and r._field == "revenue" and r.type == "conversions")
  |> group(columns: ["advertiser_id"])
  |> sum()
  |> group()
  |> sort(columns: ["_value"], desc: true)
  |> limit(n: 10)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _field: r.advertiser_id, _time: now()}))
